Replaced generic reassurance with Noreen-specific, clipped coaching anchored to immediate room pressure and sensory detail (door thud, gutter surge, table edge touch).
Converted targeted full-form pressure dialogue to contractions (shouldn't/I'll/isn't/doesn't/I'll witness) to match chapter baseline and character contraction profiles.

Replaced repeated assent nod constructions at the cited beats with differentiated logistics-bound actions (flood-step indication, bike-key handling, chair-rail stabilization). Remaining nod usages are limited to non-target moments and do not carry the same repeated assent formula. Aesthetic-risk audit passed: raw labor/blood-loss material and pressure language were preserved without softening.
finding_results.summary: Assent-beat repetition was resolved by replacing nod-based responses with distinct, physically specific actions tied to scene mechanics, eliminating the recurring single-nod pattern at the flagged locations.
